title: salix × pommaretii
intro: Salix × pommaretii, also known as Pommaret's willow, is a hybrid plant that results from the cross between Salix fragilis and Salix alba. The bark and leaves of this plant contain salicylic acid, which is responsible for its medicinal properties, making it a natural alternative to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × pommaretii include its anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, fever, and headaches. The herbal preparation of Salix × pommaretii is typically made by infusing the bark and leaves in hot water or by using the dried plant material as a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
